case_title: THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/ TREASURER VS. KAI MING LO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 45.50 SERVED OCT-01-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LO, KAI MING

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,875.00 FILED BY THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/ TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT LO, KAI MING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-22-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT KAI MING LO IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/17/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
